name: audioreworkvisions
description: AI-powered chat and image generation platform with punk-wave design

scripts.build: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html dist/ && if [ -d public ]; then cp -r public dist/; else echo 'No public directory found'; fi && if ls *.ico >/dev/null 2>&1; then cp *.ico dist/; else echo 'No ICO files found'; fi && if [ -f CNAME ]; then cp CNAME dist/; fi && cp package.json dist/
